body.processed: Save on a full synthetic oil change including a premium filter and our comprehensive multi-point inspection. Keep your engine running smoothly with the best protection available.
body.summary: Save on a full synthetic oil change including a premium filter and our comprehensive multi-point inspection. Keep your engine running smoothly with the best protection available.

terms.processed: Valid for full synthetic oil change only. One coupon per vehicle per visit. Cannot be combined with other offers. Must present coupon at time of service.
terms.summary: Valid for full synthetic oil change only. One coupon per vehicle per visit. Cannot be combined with other offers. Must present coupon at time of service.

body.processed: Get premium ceramic brake pads and new rotors at a discounted package price. Includes a free brake inspection and road test to ensure everything is working perfectly.
body.summary: Get premium ceramic brake pads and new rotors at a discounted package price. Includes a free brake inspection and road test to ensure everything is working perfectly.

terms.processed: Applies to brake pad and rotor replacement on one or both axles. Includes ceramic pads and standard rotors. Performance upgrades available at additional cost. Cannot be combined with other offers.
terms.summary: Applies to brake pad and rotor replacement on one or both axles. Includes ceramic pads and standard rotors. Performance upgrades available at additional cost. Cannot be combined with other offers.

body.processed: First time at Summit Auto Care? Welcome! Enjoy 15% off any service on your first visit. We're confident you'll see the Summit difference and become a customer for life.
body.summary: First time at Summit Auto Care? Welcome! Enjoy 15% off any service on your first visit. We're confident you'll see the Summit difference and become a customer for life.

terms.processed: Valid for new customers only. Maximum discount of $150. Applies to labor charges. Cannot be combined with other offers or applied to tires or parts-only purchases.
